SHANGHAI.name: Shanghai Doll
SHANGHAI.moves.INTENT.title: Charge
SHANGHAI.moves.INTENT.description: Deal {Intent} damage to a random enemy.
SHANGHAI.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Mass Charge
SHANGHAI.moves.MAXINTENT.description: Deal {Intent} damage to a random enemy.
PENGLAI.name: Hourai Doll
PENGLAI.moves.INTENT.title: Borrow Life
PENGLAI.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Self-Sacrifice
XIZANG.name: Tibetan Doll
XIZANG.moves.INTENT.title: None
XIZANG.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Reincarnation
XIZANG.moves.MAXINTENT.description: At the start of your next turn, gain 1 energy and draw 1 card.
HINA.name: Hina Doll
HINA.moves.INTENT.title: Prevention
HINA.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Exorcism
GOLIATH.name: Goliath Doll
GOLIATH.moves.INTENT.title: Wall of Dolls
GOLIATH.moves.INTENT.description: Give all [gold]Dolls[/gold] {Intent} [gold]Block[/gold], plus 1 additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Doll[/gold].
GOLIATH.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Fortress
GOLIATH.moves.MAXINTENT.description: [gold]Block[/gold] on all [gold]Dolls[/gold] does not expire at the start of their next turn.
ROUNDTABLE.name: Round Table Doll
ROUNDTABLE.moves.INTENT.title: Guard
ROUNDTABLE.moves.INTENT.description: Give [gold]Alice[/gold] {Intent} [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] and deal {Intent} damage to all enemies.
ROUNDTABLE.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Resolution
FRANCE.name: France Doll
FRANCE.moves.INTENT.title: Skirmish
FRANCE.moves.INTENT.description: Deal {Intent} damage to a random enemy twice.
FRANCE.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Seize the Moment
FRANCE.moves.MAXINTENT.description: Act immediately a number of times equal to the number of enemies not intending to attack.
ORL.name: Orleans Doll
ORL.moves.INTENT.title: Full Body Slam
ORL.moves.INTENT.description: Gain {Intent} [gold]Block[/gold], then deal damage equal to current [gold]Block[/gold] to a random enemy.
ORL.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Consolidate
ORL.moves.MAXINTENT.description: If you have [gold]Block[/gold], double it; otherwise, gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold].
NETHERLAND.name: Netherland Doll
NETHERLAND.moves.INTENT.title: Laser
NETHERLAND.moves.INTENT.description: Deal {Intent} damage to all enemies, decreasing by 2 each turn.
NETHERLAND.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Recharge
RUSSIA.name: Russia Doll
RUSSIA.moves.INTENT.title: Clash
RUSSIA.moves.INTENT.description: For each enemy intending to attack, increase the intent value of all [gold]Dolls[/gold] except [gold]Russia Dolls[/gold] by {Intent}.
RUSSIA.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Rally
BOMB.name: Oedo Doll
BOMB.moves.INTENT.title: Self-Destruct
BOMB.moves.INTENT.description: Deal {Intent} damage to all enemies, then die.
BOMB.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Charge Up
LONDON.name: London Doll
LONDON.moves.INTENT.title: Smog
LONDON.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Catalyze
CURSE.name: Cursed Doll
CURSE.moves.INTENT.title: Curse
CURSE.moves.INTENT.description: Apply {Intent} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies. If an enemy has debuffs, also make it lose [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the number of debuff types.
CURSE.moves.MAXINTENT.title: Malediction
CURSE.moves.MAXINTENT.description: All enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]. If an enemy has debuffs, additionally lose [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the number of debuff stacks.
